positive: A minimalist celestial constellation map featuring interconnected abstract geometric shapes and stylized woodland elements. The central composition should highlight a luminous, glowing moon surrounded by faint, interconnected star paths forming recognizable yet abstract constellations (e.g., the Hunter, the Serpent). Incorporate stylized silhouettes of various forest flora, such as ferns, stylized oak leaves, and delicate vines, integrated naturally with the cosmic map. Use a deep indigo and matte cosmic background contrasted sharply with glowing emerald green and pale gold bioluminescence. The overall style must be detailed linework illustration combined with vaporwave gradient effects, ensuring clean silhouettes and high contrast suitable for apparel printing. Art Nouveau meets cosmic geometry. Central composition, symmetrical, studio lighting, ultra-detailed vector art.
